violations.description: Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --In-use utensil was not properly stored during pauses in food preparation or dispensing. - Plastic cup found in flour.
Thawing potentially hazardous food. — --Potentially hazardous food, Bacon was not thawed in an approved manner. - Full box of bacon thawing on counter- moved to walk-in

Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food (prepared more than 24 hours ago) was not properly date marked. - Many items found without dates.
Clean/dry location, protected, covered, original containers, labeled (2 pts deducted)
Method, clean, temp, concentration, exposure time, equipment/utensils sanitized (4 pts deducted)
Handwashing, good hygienic practices (5 pts deducted)
Clean, proper use, storage, sanitizing solution (2 pts deducted)
